songs.title: No Address
songs.description: A survival record for the nights when home feels more like a memory than a place.
songs.story: A record about losing the idea of home and still refusing to stop moving.
songs.lyricsExcerpt: Lyrics placeholder: the room got cold, but the motion stayed.

songs.title: Dad I'm Not Okay
songs.description: A confession that says what most sons never learn how to say out loud.
songs.story: A direct confession for family pain, anger, need, and everything sons are taught to hide.
songs.lyricsExcerpt: Lyrics placeholder: I learned silence before I learned how to ask for help.

songs.title: Static In My Veins
songs.description: Anxiety, impulse, addiction, and ambition colliding in real time.
songs.story: A pressure record for the mind that keeps moving faster than the room can hold.
songs.lyricsExcerpt: Lyrics placeholder: my thoughts got teeth, but my dreams still bite back.

songs.title: Barely Holding On
songs.description: For the person smiling in public while breaking in private.
songs.story: For the person who looks calm because explaining the breaking got too expensive.
songs.lyricsExcerpt: Lyrics placeholder: I smiled so nobody could count the cracks.

songs.title: When The Walls Cave In
songs.description: A cinematic fall-apart anthem about losing everything and still reaching for something.
songs.story: A comeback record that does not pretend the rebuild looked clean.
songs.lyricsExcerpt: Lyrics placeholder: the walls came down, but I found proof in the dust.
